[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10001000 2
1 00101101 4
2 01011000 3
3 01111110 6
4 00010000 1
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 10011010 4
